title: Erased
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Organization |image=[[File:Last_of_the_Jedi_by_Chris_Scalf.jpg]] |name=Erased |type= |founder= |leader= |subgroup= |headquarters=[[Orange District]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' |locations=[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' |formed= |founded=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved= |restored= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|Who are they?''"
"''A mixed lot, I'd say. Anyone the Empire was hounding. Heroes and villains. Some journalists, some former Republic army officers. Maybe some criminals mixed in.|Trever Flume and Dexter Jettster in Coruscant|}} The '''Erased''' were a group of people who did not want to be [[Death/Legends|executed]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] for [[Treason/Legends|treason]], so they erased all memory of their existence. They took refuge with [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]], who was considered an unofficial leader, in the [[Orange District]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], one of the safehouses of the Erased was in [[Thugger's Alley]] and was headed by Dexter.''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]'' Many Erased members died when [[Duro (individual)|Duro]] exposed the location of [[Solace (location)|Solace]]. However, [[Oryon]] and [[Trever Flume]] were able to escape along with [[Fy-Tor-Ana|Solace]] and [[Keets Freely]], eventually learning that [[Curran Caladian]] had also escaped the devastation. One of the safe houses of the Erased that was locate don Thugger's Alley was eventually attacked by the Empire, who vaporized the alley. Luckily, Keets, Curran and Dex were able to escape before it was vaporized.''[[The Last of the Jedi: Master of Deception]]'' However, they decided to lay low afterwards and find a new home, deciding to back out of [[Moonstrike (Acherin)|Moonstrike]], as they believed the Empire knew what they were hitting with that attack''[[The Last of the Jedi: Reckoning]]'' as they were communicating with resistance leaders to organize the first Moonstrike meeting. However, after [[Ferus Olin]] realised that [[Eve Yarrow|Flame]] was an Imperial agent, he assumed the Empire's attack on Thugger's Alley was because of Flame reporting where the safe house was. Keets, Curran and Dex had found another colony of Erased a hundred levels below the Orange District in the old water reservoir's of Coruscant and went to join them, living on a house raft. The place was described by Keets as being like a water world. ==Appearances== *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Death on Naboo]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: A Tangled Web]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Return of the Dark Side]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Against the Empire]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Master of Deception]]'' *''[[The Last of the Jedi: Reckoning]]'' ==Sources== *[[Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection 4|''Star Wars: The Official Starships & Vehicles Collection'' 4]] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Ausgelöschte |es=Los Borrados }} [[Category:Coruscant organizations]] [[Category:Coruscanti]]
